title: Renting a Bicycle
content: Daniel decided to rent a bicycle instead of using public transportation during his vacation. Riding through the city allowed him to explore areas that many tourists never visited. He followed riverside paths, quiet streets, and scenic parks throughout the day. The bicycle gave him freedom to stop whenever something interesting caught his attention. Although he became tired after several hours, the experience felt rewarding. Daniel believed cycling was one of the best ways to discover a city at a comfortable pace.
